title: feat: rebrand logos, regenerate PWA assets, add SEO meta hooks
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fresh coat of paint
gist.blurb: We just rolled out a shiny new branding update across the hive. Expect crisper logos, updated icons, and some under-the-hood SEO magic to help the world find us.
gist.summary: Updated platform branding with new logos, regenerated PWA assets, and added dynamic SEO meta hooks across the frontend.
gist.impact: You'll notice sharper icons and better link previews when sharing pollinations.ai, plus improved search engine visibility.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an artist/painter updating the visual identity, while the Monitor Robot represents search/SEO by inspecting the new assets with a magnifying glass.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, carefully painting a giant glowing lime green (#ecf874) pixelated logo on a canvas. The chunky monitor robot stands nearby holding a magnifying glass, looking at the fresh paint. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
